item.title: pocketbase/pocketbase
item.description: Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

item.title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
item.description: Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

item.title: authelia/authelia
item.description: The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps

item.title: teamhanko/hanko
item.description: Authentication and user management for the passkey era.

item.title: vuesion/vuesion
item.description: Vuesion is a boilerplate that empowers product teams to build faster with modern best practices across engineering and design. It features a full-stack framework, comprehensive design system, robust testing, and seamless internationalization.
